title: wolfhsm: integration test suite
description: Write 20 integration tests for wolfhsm crate. Skip body when WOLFHSM_SERVER env var absent. Uses independent oracles only — p256 crate verifies ECDSA, ed25519-dalek verifies Ed25519, rsa crate verifies RSA, sha2 crate for SHA vectors, NIST CMAC test vectors. Tests: connect_disconnect, echo, nvm_write_read, nvm_overwrite, nvm_not_found, nvm_label_too_long, counter_lifecycle, ecc_keygen_sign_verify, ecc_ecdh, ecc_export_der, ed25519_sign_verify, curve25519_dh, rsa_sign_verify, mldsa_sign_verify, aes_gcm_roundtrip, sha256_known_vector, cmac_known_vector, cryptocb_routes_to_hsm (register then drop guard, same call fails), signer_trait_ecc, signer_trait_ed25519.
